[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00001000 1
3 00000000 a
4 01010100 3
5 01001100 3
6 01000110 3
7 01010001 3
